# Declgen

`sqfts declgen` generates skeleton [declaration files](Declaration-Files) from Arma `CfgFunctions` / mission `Functions.h` layouts.

## Why

Large missions already register hundreds of `TAG_fnc_*` functions. Declgen walks the registration file, finds each implementation when possible, and emits:

```sqfts
// Auto-generated by `sqfts declgen`. Tighten types by hand.
// Source: mission.MyMap/Functions.h

// --- Actions ---
declare function TAG_fnc_payFine(_unit: object): any;
declare function TAG_fnc_impoundVehicle(): any;
```

You then tighten types without renaming or rewriting every `.sqf`.

## Usage

### Mission `Functions.h`

```bash
sqfts declgen mission.MyMap/Functions.h \
  --root mission.MyMap \
  --tag-default TAG \
  --out .sqfts/mission.d.sqfts
```

### Server / addon `config.cpp`

```bash
sqfts declgen addon_server/config.cpp \
  --root addon_server \
  --tag-default SERVER \
  --cfg-functions \
  --out .sqfts/server.d.sqfts
```

`--cfg-functions` restricts parsing to `class CfgFunctions { … }`.

### Addon path prefixes

Some configs store `file = "addon_name\path\to\fn"` where `addon_name\` is a PBO/prefix that does **not** exist under `--root` on disk. Configure strip prefixes in `sqfts.toml` (preferred) or pass `--strip-prefix` on the CLI:

```toml
# sqfts.toml
[declgen]
strip_prefixes = ["addon_name/"]
```

```bash
sqfts declgen addon_server/config.cpp \
  --project . \
  --root addon_server \
  --tag-default SERVER \
  --cfg-functions \
  --out .sqfts/server.d.sqfts
```

CLI `--strip-prefix` values override the `[declgen]` list when any are passed. If your on-disk layout already matches the `file =` paths, leave `strip_prefixes` empty.

## Options

| Flag | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `--root` | Directory used to resolve `file = "…"` paths (mission / addon root) |
| `--project` | Path to `sqfts.toml` or project root (loads `[declgen]`; default `.`) |
| `--tag-default` | Fallback tag when a group omits `tag = "…"` |
| `--cfg-functions` | Parse only `CfgFunctions` |
| `--strip-prefix PREFIX` | Strip a leading path prefix from `file = "…"` (repeatable; overrides config) |
| `--out` | Output `.d.sqfts` path |

## Param inference

When the corresponding `.sqf` exists and starts with a `params` array using guard forms, declgen maps exemplars to types (`[0]` → `number`, `[objNull]` → `object`, …). Otherwise it emits `(): any` (or empty params). Empty / malformed param names are sanitized to `_argN`.

Return types are always `any` in the skeleton — set them by hand.

## After generation

1. Point `declarations` in [`sqfts.toml`](Configuration) at the output folder.
2. Optionally enable `check_plain_sqf`.
3. Run `sqfts check` and fix mismatches by tightening declarations (or fixing call sites).
4. See [Adoption Guide](Adoption-Guide).
